response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including C++ (used at National Instruments), but his recent roles have been primarily in web/mobile development (Node.js, TypeScript, React) rather than C++ or industrial automation. His expertise in high-performance systems is demonstrated via Dlang and multi-threaded applications, but lacks direct experience with STL, message brokers, or IEC 62443 security standards. His security focus appears limited to general practices rather than industrial cybersecurity.
strengths: Strong background in C++ (National Instruments) and high-performance systems (Dlang, multi-threading)
Experience with scalable architectures (micro-services, Kubernetes, real-time systems)
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (mostly web/mobile stack in last 7+ years)
No direct experience with STL, message brokers, or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443)
Lacks exposure to cloud platforms (Azure) or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA)
